case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS ANICETE ALFREDO L.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,526.46 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT ANICETE ALFREDO L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $35.55 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ANICETE ALFREDO L.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANICETE ALFREDO L.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANICETE ALFREDO L.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANICETE ALFREDO L. $1,525.46 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,582.46 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ANICETE ALFREDO L.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,688.05 AS TO DEFENDANT ANICETE ALFREDO L.
